personas: Persona 1: Tech-Savvy Professional - Age 25-40, uses digital tools daily for work, values efficiency and clarity.
Persona 2: Casual User - Age 18-60, less frequent user, prefers intuitive and simple interfaces.
key_flows: User onboarding flow: Sign up, profile setup, initial tutorial.
Primary task flow: Search or select content, interact with main features, save or share results.
friction_points: Confusing navigation leading to difficulty finding key features.
Lack of feedback during loading causing uncertainty about system status.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content is organized with primary features at top level, secondary functions grouped under clearly labeled sections, and help/support content accessible but unobtrusive.
navigation: Top navigation bar with Home, Features, Pricing, Support, and Profile sections.
Secondary sidebar navigation for contextual options within main sections.
categorization: Features categorized by user goals (e.g., Create, Manage, Analyze).
Support content categorized by FAQs, Guides, and Contact.

components: Header with logo, navigation, and user profile access
Left sidebar for contextual navigation and filters
Main content area for primary interactions and data display

responsive.mobile: Single column layout with hamburger menu for navigation and collapsible sections for content.
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar to maximize content area.
responsive.desktop: Full two-column layout with persistent sidebar and header.

design_system.typography: Primary font: Sans-serif (e.g., Open Sans or Roboto). Headers in 24px bold, subheaders 18px semi-bold, body text 14px regular. Line height 1.5 for readability.
design_system.colors: Primary palette includes a blue tone for interactive elements, neutral greys for backgrounds and text, and red for error states. Accent colors for calls to action are used sparingly.
design_system.spacing: Base spacing unit of 8px, with multiples for margin and padding (8px, 16px, 24px, 32px). Consistent gutters between columns and components.
components: Buttons with defined states and sizes
Input fields with labels and helper text
Modals and dialogs with clear dismissal options

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard with visible focus indicators.
accessibility.screen_reader: Proper use of ARIA roles and labels to provide semantic meaning and context.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for text and interactive elements against background colors.

interactions.animations: Subtle transitions on hover and focus states with duration ~200ms for smooth user feedback; loading spinners fade in/out.
interactions.loading_state: Loading indicators displayed centrally within content areas to inform users of ongoing processes.
interactions.empty_state: Informative messages with icons and suggestions appear when no data is available, guiding users toward next actions.
